data.note: To ensure we celebrate every moment together, guests are kindly requested to arrive early as the Groomside will depart promptly at the scheduled time. We will be traveling by car for a scenic two-hour journey to reach Karpi, Arwal. Upon our arrival, the festivities will truly begin—the grand barat procession is set to start at 19:00, featuring a vibrant display of lights, DJ, dance, and firecrackers.

We are excited to begin our journey! For those joining the Barat procession, the groom’s side will be traveling from Ara and reaching Arwal by 18:00. We kindly request guests to join the team at our residence by 16:00 for the departure. If you prefer to meet us there, please join the celebration directly at Karpi, Arwal at 19:00. The grand entry will proceed toward Nand Marriage Hall, featuring a high-energy celebration with a DJ, vibrant lights, dancing, and spectacular firecrackers to mark the groom’s arrival!
data.location: Nand Marriage Hall, Mahuabag, Arwal, Bihar

data.note: The reception will continue late into the evening. Guests are welcome to join, meet the couple, and enjoy the celebrations.
